title: Inventory
description: Schema for embedded preflight inventory blocks

vars.description: Inventory-wide variables applied before group and host variables

groups.description: Optional group metadata referenced by host group labels

vars.description: Variables applied to hosts that reference this group

transport.description: Connection transport. Defaults to "ssh" when omitted.

port.description: Connection port (defaults vary by transport: SSH=22, WinRM=5985/5986)

private_key.description: Path to SSH private key file

private_key_passphrase.description: Passphrase for an encrypted SSH private_key

groups.description: Group labels this host belongs to, applied in order for variable precedence

known_hosts_file.description: Path to a known_hosts file for SSH host key verification

host_key_policy.description: SSH host-key verification policy. accept-new (default) trusts unknown hosts on first connect and pins them; strict requires the host to already be in known_hosts_file; insecure disables verification entirely.

host_key_algorithms.description: Restrict accepted SSH host key algorithms during handshake

timeout.description: Connection/handshake timeout as a Go duration string (e.g. "30s", "1m") for SSH and WinRM. Defaults to 30s for SSH when unset.

jump.description: Optional single-hop SSH bastion to dial through before reaching this host. The jump host has its own independent authentication and host-key policy.

address.description: IP address or hostname of the jump host

port.description: Jump host SSH port. Defaults to 22.

private_key.description: SSH private key value, path, or secret reference for the jump host

private_key_passphrase.description: Passphrase for an encrypted jump host private_key

known_hosts_file.description: Path to a known_hosts file for jump host key verification

host_key_policy.description: SSH host-key verification policy for the jump host. accept-new (default) trusts unknown hosts on first connect and pins them; strict requires the jump host to already be in known_hosts_file; insecure disables verification entirely.
